shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Ontario women entrepreneurship support with FedDev Ontario RE3 grants up to $5,000, PARO microfinancing, Women Funding available: up to $850M (with related programs offering $5,000,).
shortAnswerQuestion: What grants are available for women-owned businesses in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Ontario Women Business Grants  |  Support Programs & Non-Repayable Funding in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Ontario Women Business Grants  |  Support Programs & Non-Repayable Funding?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $850M.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: RE3 Fast Track
expertTip.content: The FedDev Ontario RE3 Program offers up to $5,000 with minimal paperwork. It's the fastest path to non-repayable funding for women entrepreneurs.
